# PERF-044-per-func positive: repeated type assertions in one function still fire
lang: go
file: PERF-044-per-func-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "net/http"

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

type anyVal interface{ Value() int }

type intVal int

func (i intVal) Value() int { return int(i) }

func Handler(c *gin.Context) {
	var v anyVal = intVal(7)
	_ = v.(intVal).Value()
	_ = v.(intVal).Value()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
